Implement the following Clojure function from a real library.

(defn as-int
  "Parse a string into an integer, or `nil` if the string cannot be parsed."
  [s])

Observed behavior in repo tests:
- (is (= (as-int "1") 1))
- (is (= (as-int "-1") -1))

Contract type: docstring_and_test
Provide only the function implementation.

(defn as-int
  "Parse a string into an integer, or `nil` if the string cannot be parsed."
  [s]
  (try
    (Long/parseLong s)
    (catch NumberFormatException _ nil)))

Implement the following Clojure function from a real library.

(defn as-uuid
  "Parse a string into a UUID, or `nil` if the string cannot be parsed."
  [s])

Observed behavior in repo tests:
- (is (= (as-uuid "de305d54-75b4-431b-adb2-eb6b9e546014")
- (is (nil? (as-uuid "")))

Contract type: docstring_and_test
Provide only the function implementation.

(defn as-uuid
  "Parse a string into a UUID, or `nil` if the string cannot be parsed."
  [s]
  (if (re-matches uuid-pattern s)
    (try
      (java.util.UUID/fromString s)
      (catch IllegalArgumentException _ nil))))

Implement the following Clojure function from a real library.

(defn send
  "Send `x` as a Ring response. Checks to see if `x` satisfies [[Sendable]],
  and if not, falls back to [[Renderable]]."
  [[Sendable]])

Observed in repo tests:
- related test file: test/compojure/response_test.clj

Contract type: docstring_and_test
Provide only the function implementation.

(defn send
  "Send `x` as a Ring response. Checks to see if `x` satisfies [[Sendable]],
  and if not, falls back to [[Renderable]]."
  [x request respond raise]
  (if (satisfies? Sendable x)
    (send* x request respond raise)
    (respond (render x request))))

Implement the following Clojure function from a real library.

(defn make-route
  "Returns a function that will only call the handler if the method and path
  match the request."
  [method path handler])

Observed in repo tests:
- related test file: test/compojure/core_test.clj

Contract type: docstring_and_test
Provide only the function implementation.

(defn make-route
  "Returns a function that will only call the handler if the method and path
  match the request."
  [method path handler]
  (-> handler
      (wrap-response)
      (wrap-route-middleware)
      (wrap-route-info [(or method :any) (str path)])
      (wrap-route-matches method path)))

Implement the following Clojure function from a real library.

(defn compile-route
  "Compile a route in the form `(method path bindings & body)` into a function.
  Used to create custom route macros."
  [method path bindings body])

Observed in repo tests:
- related test file: test/compojure/core_test.clj

Contract type: docstring_and_test
Provide only the function implementation.

(defn compile-route
  "Compile a route in the form `(method path bindings & body)` into a function.
  Used to create custom route macros."
  [method path bindings body]
  `(make-route
    ~method
    ~(prepare-route path)
    (fn [request#]
      (let-request [~bindings request#] ~@body))))

Implement the following Clojure function from a real library.

(defn routes
  "Create a Ring handler by combining several handlers into one."
  [& handlers])

Observed in repo tests:
- related test file: test/compojure/core_test.clj
- related test file: test/compojure/middleware_test.clj

Contract type: docstring_and_test
Provide only the function implementation.

(defn routes
  "Create a Ring handler by combining several handlers into one."
  [& handlers]
  (fn
    ([request]
     (apply routing request handlers))
    ([request respond raise]
     (letfn [(f [handlers]
               (if (seq handlers)
                 (let [handler  (first handlers)
                       respond' #(if % (respond %) (f (rest handlers)))]
                   (handler request respond' raise))
                 (respond nil)))]
       (f handlers)))))

Implement the following Clojure function from a real library.

(defn remove-trailing-slash
  "Remove the trailing '/' from a URI string, if it exists."
  [^String uri])

Observed in repo tests:
- related test file: test/compojure/middleware_test.clj

Contract type: docstring_and_test
Provide only the function implementation.

(defn remove-trailing-slash
  "Remove the trailing '/' from a URI string, if it exists."
  [^String uri]
  (if (.endsWith uri "/")
    (.substring uri 0 (dec (.length uri)))
    uri))
